title: HEARS-LM: A hearing-loss–specific protein language model for variant pathogenicity
description: HEARS-LM (Hereditary EAR Sequence Language Model) is a domain-adapted protein language model that couples ESM-2 sequence embeddings, refined through low-rank adaptation, with 100 curated hearing-loss–relevant biological descriptors via cross-attention fusion. Four task-specific heads are trained jointly under a thermodynamic auxiliary objective.

creators.name: Chen, Peng
creators.affiliation: Department of Otorhinolaryngology, Meishan People's Hospital, China
